title: Junior Instructional Designer at Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners
company: Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners:
Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners!
